descript.abstract: This dataset shows information about the USDA Forest Service recreation sites used to populate the public facing web pages. This information is the descriptive and qualitative information used to set appropriate expectations for visitor use.
descript.purpose: This dataset was developed to provide public facing information about recreation sites.

idinfo.useconst: The USDA Forest Service makes no warranty, expressed or implied, including the warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose, nor assumes any legal liability or responsibility for the accuracy, reliability, completeness or utility of these geospatial data, or for the improper or incorrect use of these geospatial data. These geospatial data and related maps or graphics are not legal documents and are not intended to be used as such. The data and maps may not be used to determine title, ownership, legal descriptions or boundaries, legal jurisdiction, or restrictions that may be in place on either public or private land. Natural hazards may or may not be depicted on the data and maps, and users should exercise due caution. The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible to verify the limitations of the geospatial data and to use the data accordingly.

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

cntinfo.cntvoice: Please send an e-mail to the address below.

procstep.procdesc: Dataset is produced from recreation managers and is of variable accuracy.

enttyp.enttypd: Feature class: A collection of geographic features with the same geometry type (such as point, line, or polygon), the same attributes, and the same spatial reference.

attr.attrdef: Internal feature number.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Sub site infra unique control number.
Unique INFRA control number of the top level of the relational hierarchy.
Unique INFRA control number of the mid/top level of the relational hierarchy.
USFS Region where rec site is located
Forest number
Identification number of the managing ranger district.
Local site identifier, unique within a forest but not unique across all forests.
Local site name.
Identifies the type of recreation site.
The existence status of the recreation site.

edom.edomvd: The recreation site does not exist and was previously disposed of
This recreation site is in tentative planning but has not been constructed.
This record represents a data error - this recreation site does not exist in this data form
This recreation site is existing on the ground
list of status of recreation sites

attr.attrdef: Operating status of the site during its intended season of use.
The level of development of the recreation site.

edom.edomvd: designated developed site with significant investment and delineation with amenities that may include signage, interpretive materials, fire rings, grills, tables, waste collection, potable water, flush toilets, roads, parking and paths that are surface or paved
designated developed site with significant investment and delineation with amenities that may include signage, fire rings, tables, toilets, waste collection, potable water, surfaced roads

designated developed site with significant investment and delineation with amenities typically including signage, interpretive displays, fire rings, grills, tables, waste collection, potable water, flush toilets, utility hook ups, showers, and laundry. Roads, parking and pathways are clearly delineated and often paved
primarily user created dispersed site, informal vehicle circulation, minimal investment
user created or dispersed site, no investment
defined vehicle circulation and parking with minimal FS investment; limited amenities may include signage, tables, fire rings and rarely a toilet

attr.attrdef: the USFS Point of sale system identifier
Recreation.gov ID
Total persons at one time (PAOT) capacity of recreation site
indicates whether fee is charged

edom.edomvd: Yes, a fee is charged
The unit does not charge a fee

attr.attrdef: The type of fee charged at the site

edom.edomvd: a fee is charged for multiple days
a fee is charged by year
a fee is charged by hour
a fee is charged by season
a fee is charged by week
A fee is charged for overnight use
a fee is charged by month
a fee is charged for day use

attr.attrdef: Official name of the recreation area that will appear on the public website
Yes/No flag that designates whether the area is published on the public website

edom.edomvd: Yes, the area is published on the public website
The unit is not published on the public website

attr.attrdef: Description that appears on the public website
Common name for a group of related recreation sites.
Name and description of the information center that serves the recreation area.
A set of keywords to ensure that the public can find the site in a web search
Explanation of user fees
Time of day when the area is open to the public
Months of the year when the recreation area is open to the public.
Months most suitable for recreational use.
Time of year when the area has the most visitors.
Rating for the amount of use the area has during the open season.
Indicates whether visitor must pack out trash (yes = pack out trash)

edom.edomvd: The unit has trash service and visitors are not required to pack out their trash
Yes, the visitor must pack out trash

attr.attrdef: Name which the site is commonly known by
Name of alternative site(s) if the original is not available.
Recreation.gov ID for the recreation site.
Recreation site ID on the USFS website.
Recreation.gov URL
USFS website URL
Site's time zone
Significant information about contacts.
sub-site employee or general contact information
List of available rentals (campsites, cabins, rooms, etc) and guides, including outfitters
List of required passes that are required to access or use the area
List of required permits and the conditions under which the permits are needed
Any restrictions for the area, such as no pets
List of towns near the area
List of all the states in which the area is located

Description of public water availability-often the most important information about a site. The information appears in an At-a-Glance table with suggested values of None, Drinking Water, Not for Drinking.
Description of available rest rooms, possibly including type, accessibility, and location. The information appears in an At-a-Glance table with suggested values of Pit, vault, or Flush.
Information about whether the site is operated by the Forest Service or a concessionaire, include name and contact information.
Description of the open season: weather, general activities, and possible special events
Information about how to reach the recreation area
Highest elevation in the area
Lowest elevation in the area
A pipe delimited list of Activity Types associated in proximity of the Recsite or RecSubsite

attrdomv.udom: A pipe delimited list of Activity Types associated in proximity of the Recsite or RecSubsite

attr.attrdef: Indicates how busy the season is
sub-site season start date
sub-site season end date
Maximum number of people allowed at the unit
Indicates whether a pass is an accepted form of payment

edom.edomvd: Yes, a pass is an accepted form of payment
The unit does not accept a pass as a form of payment

attr.attrdef: Identifies the type of Limited Use Award Method
Limited use award type contracting designation
latitude of point location and entry point to rec site if location is not a single lat/long
longitude of point location and entry point to rec site if location is not a single lat/long
A date field that shows the last date a record was edited. Can be used to determine if record needs to be updated.
Feature geometry.
The date when the record was last created or updated in the EDW database.
The CRC value (Cyclic Redundancy Check) is a computed checksum that acts as a unique fingerprint for each record. It enables efficient change detection in ETL workflows.
Unique identifier for the record
A list of Services

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

cntinfo.cntvoice: Please send an e-mail to the address below

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
